testcase.name: test_build_and_wifi_kconfig
testcase.summary: Verify build and WiFi/SDIO-specific Kconfig options (WIFI, WIFI_AIROC, SDIO_STACK, SDHC_DWC, NET_OFFLOAD).
testcase.preconditions: 1. Zephyr SDK installed, west initialized. 2. Supported board: alif_e8_dk with SDIO WiFi overlay.

step.actions: Build with: west build -b alif_e8_dk/ae822fa0e5597xx0/rtss_hp samples/net/wifi/shell. Verify Kconfig: WIFI=y, WIFI_AIROC=y, CYW55500=y, SDIO_STACK=y, SDHC_DWC=y, NET_OFFLOAD=y, WIFI_OFFLOAD=y.
step.expectedresults: Console: "All WiFi Kconfig options verified". Build succeeds. Test PASSES.

testcase.name: test_sdio_wifi_init_and_device_ready
testcase.summary: SDIO stack init, SDHC probe, airoc-wifi device ready, WiFi reg-on GPIO toggle.
testcase.preconditions: 1. Firmware booted. SDIO WiFi module (CYW55500) present. 2. GPIO14 pin 7 controls WiFi reg-on (active high).

step.actions: Boot firmware. Observe SDHC init logs. Verify airoc-wifi device binds successfully.
step.expectedresults: SDHC init OK. airoc-wifi device ready. WiFi reg-on GPIO asserted.

step.actions: Check shell prompt available. Type 'wifi --help' to list commands.
step.expectedresults: Shell prompt responsive. wifi commands listed: scan, connect, disconnect, status, etc.

testcase.name: test_wifi_scan
testcase.summary: WiFi scan command: request scan, parse results (SSID, channel, RSSI, security).
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi device ready. At least one AP within range.

step.actions: Type 'wifi scan' in shell. Wait for scan completion.
step.expectedresults: Console prints scan table: Num | SSID | Chan | RSSI | Sec. At least one entry found. "Scan request done" printed.

step.actions: Verify scan result columns: SSID non-empty, Chan numeric, RSSI negative dBm, Sec field present.
step.expectedresults: All fields populated correctly. No empty SSID in valid entries. Test PASSES.

testcase.name: test_wifi_connect_wpa2
testcase.summary: WiFi connect to WPA2-PSK AP: associate, authenticate, obtain IP via DHCP.
testcase.preconditions: 1. Known AP SSID and passphrase within range. 2. AP configured for WPA2-PSK.

step.actions: Type: wifi connect "<SSID>" <security_type> "<passphrase>". Wait for association.
step.expectedresults: Console shows "Connection requested" then "Connected". Link status: UP.

step.actions: Type 'net iface' to verify interface state. Check IPv4 address assigned.
step.expectedresults: Interface state: UP. IPv4 address assigned (not 0.0.0.0). DHCP lease obtained.

step.actions: Verify WiFi status: type 'wifi status'. Check SSID, band, channel, RSSI, security.
step.expectedresults: SSID matches target. Security shows WPA2. RSSi present. Test PASSES.

testcase.name: test_wifi_disconnect
testcase.summary: WiFi disconnect: leave network, interface down, IP released.

step.actions: Type 'wifi disconnect'. Wait for disconnect completion.
step.expectedresults: Console shows "Disconnected". Interface state: DOWN.

step.actions: Type 'net iface'. Verify IPv4 address cleared (0.0.0.0).
step.expectedresults: IPv4 address unassigned. WiFi status shows disconnected. Test PASSES.

testcase.name: test_ping_to_gateway
testcase.summary: Network layer validation: ping gateway/AP IP after WiFi connect.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi connected and DHCP IP obtained.

step.actions: Type 'net ping <gateway_ip>' or use 'net ping' with default gateway. Send 4 packets.
step.expectedresults: All 4 ping replies received. RTT values printed. 0% packet loss.

testcase.name: test_wifi_reconnect
testcase.summary: WiFi reconnect after disconnect: reconnect to same AP, verify IP re-acquired.
testcase.preconditions: 1. Previously connected to AP and disconnected.

step.actions: Type 'wifi connect "<SSID>" <security_type> "<passphrase>"'. Wait for connection.
step.expectedresults: Connected successfully. DHCP IP obtained.

step.actions: Verify ping to gateway succeeds after reconnect.
step.expectedresults: Ping replies received. Test PASSES.

testcase.name: test_shell_net_commands
testcase.summary: Verify net_shell commands: net iface, net ping, net dns, net stats.

step.actions: Type 'net iface'. Verify interface details: name, index, state, MTU, IPv4 addr, gateway, netmask.
step.expectedresults: All fields present and valid. MTU > 0. IPv4 not 0.0.0.0.

step.actions: Type 'net stats'. Verify packet/byte RX/TX counters.
step.expectedresults: Counters displayed. RX/TX bytes > 0 after ping.

step.actions: Type 'net dns' to verify DNS resolver status.
step.expectedresults: DNS server list printed. Resolver enabled. Test PASSES.

testcase.name: test_wifi_scan_connect_roaming
testcase.summary: Scan multiple APs, connect to strongest signal, verify band/channel selection.
testcase.preconditions: 1. Multiple APs with same SSID or different SSIDs within range.

step.actions: Run 'wifi scan'. Identify AP with best RSSI. Note channel and band.
step.expectedresults: Scan results show multiple APs with varying RSSI values.

step.actions: Connect to strongest AP. Verify 'wifi status' shows expected channel/band.
step.expectedresults: Connected to target AP. Channel and band match scan result. Test PASSES.

testcase.name: test_manual_wifi_stress_and_power
testcase.summary: Manual: 10 connect/disconnect cycles, long-duration stability, WiFi module power cycle.
testcase.preconditions: 1. Physical access to board and WiFi module. 2. Stable AP within range.

step.actions: Perform 10 connect/disconnect cycles. Verify each cycle completes without SDIO bus errors.
step.expectedresults: All 10 cycles pass. No SDIO CRC or timeout errors.

step.actions: Leave connected for 30 minutes. Verify periodic ping replies and no disconnection.
step.expectedresults: Connection stable. No drops.

step.actions: Power cycle board. Verify auto-connect or manual reconnect works post-boot.
step.expectedresults: WiFi module re-initializes correctly. Scan and connect work after power cycle.
